Details: The electronic beam (E-beam)process was shown to be effective in destroying MTBE in groundwater. The E-beam unit is made of an electron accelerator, a scanner, a contact chamber, and lead shielding. MTBE contaminated water that passes through the scanner was reduced below MDL of 0.078 ug/L at the lowest dose (1.67 kGy) of E-beam. Similarly, irradiation of MTBE contaminated water by Cobalt-60 gamma rays completely degraded MTBE within 5 min with irradiation of 59.7 Gy/min.
